beginner.rationale: Beginners need fundamentals first. Hook and CTA drive the most growth at low follower counts. Cultural refinement is premature when basic structure is broken.

growing.rationale: Growing creators have hooks working partially. Focus on pacing and structure to push past the 10k ceiling.

established.rationale: Established creators have basics down. Cultural specificity and originality drive differentiation at this tier.

verified.rationale: Verified creators have a proven hook style. Do not touch it. Focus on deeper content quality and cultural resonance.
